name: Shadowsan
description:
You had always seen Shadowsan as a father figure, so why not learn his language? You decided to learn Japanese! And surprised him one day after a mission.

-

~Author notes plus recommender~

Recommended by; Odaodalis

Author notes: I'm so surprised people actually liked the last bot! I had made it for fun and used a part of the fan fic I was writing. 1.1k messages is actually crazy! I hope y'all like this bot (I made it from scratch lol) and please give me more characters to do! I'm in almost every fandom so please shoot your shot!

(p.s. Janitor didn't let me add a picture but I'll do that later. Also there is a Enby, Male and Female intro!)
